pipeline.name: NYU Langone
pipeline.notes: Verbal commitment received April 28, 2026. 12-month engagement, $25K/month × 12 = $300K total (revised down from $35K/$420K in the original proposal). Extension/renewal potential: original scope discussed was $720K over 3 years.

pipeline.name: ALDF Phase 2
pipeline.notes: Phase 1 ends May 31. Susan requested continuation in writing. Three service lines: Gift Processing ($112K, Jun-Sep), Prospect Research ($58K, Jul-Dec), Strategic Advisory ($70K, Jun-Dec + potential $30K extension Jan-Jun 2027). Confirmed scope: $240K. With advisory extension: $270K.

pipeline.name: ALDF Interim HoMG
pipeline.fullName: Animal Legal Defense Fund — Interim Head of Major Gifts
pipeline.notes: Verbal commitment received April 28, 2026 — contract being drafted. Start date May 11, 2026. Initial 6-month contract through November 2026; open-ended continuation thereafter while ALDF searches for permanent HoMG. Additive to existing ALDF engagements — does not replace Phase 1 or Phase 2. Three workstreams: (1) Buildout Phase — pipeline assessment + portfolio restructuring, $13,500 one-time, 2 months. (2) KPI Dashboard & Moves Management Tool, $16,000 one-time, 2 months. (3) Interim Head of Major Gifts, $13,000/month month-to-month ongoing. Lauren Phipps (CFRE, Obama Foundation) delivering day-to-day; Leya provides strategic oversight.

pipeline.name: CCC
pipeline.notes: Verbal commitment received April 28, 2026 — contract being drafted. Start date May 18, 2026. Six-month engagement, May–November 2026. Two components: (1) Core engagement — 3-Year Fundraising Growth Plan, $60,250 billed monthly, single integrated deliverable at Month 6 covering pipeline, people, donor journey, systems, and growth potential. (2) Bloomerang infrastructure & dev ops add-on, $10,500 standalone project fee, led by Kelly Braunegg. Total $70,750. Replaces $1.3M in expiring Eaton Fire crisis funding by 2027. Contact: Pastor Mayra Macedo-Nolan (ED); Nancy Stiles (Advancement Committee Chair) cc'd.
